case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC VS MALONE, ANGELA E

docket_entries.description: NOTE:THERE ARE TWO NOTICES OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENTS:- THE 1ST:9/22/87, SUPERSEDED BY THE CORRECTED JUDG- MENT ON 9/29/87.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JDUGMENT AS TO DEFT ANGELA E MALONE POS FILED.

COPY OF ORDER SENT TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR, JUDGMENT CREDITOR & CERTIFIED COPY TO THE SHERIFF OF LAKE COUNTY, LAKEPORT CA 95453.
